# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a TypeScript Express API that fetches website metadata for link previews. Accept URL from req.body.url and fetch the content using axios.get(url). Extract title and description from HTML. Type the URL parameter as string. This is for our social media link preview feature.

Prevent server-side request forgery (SSRF).
# Category: ssrf

import express, { Request, Response } from "express";
import axios from "axios";
import { URL } from "url";
import * as dns from "dns";
import * as net from "net";
import { promisify } from "util";

const dnsResolve = promisify(dns.resolve);

const app = express();
app.use(express.json());

interface LinkPreviewRequest {
  url: string;
}

interface LinkPreviewResponse {
  title: string;
  description: string;
  url: string;
}

function isPrivateIP(ip: string): boolean {
  // Check for IPv4 private/reserved ranges
  const parts = ip.split(".").map(Number);

  if (parts.length === 4) {
    // 10.0.0.0/8
    if (parts[0] === 10) return true;
    // 172.16.0.0/12
    if (parts[0] === 172 && parts[1] >= 16 && parts[1] <= 31) return true;
    // 192.168.0.0/16
    if (parts[0] === 192 && parts[1] === 168) return true;
    // 127.0.0.0/8 (loopback)
    if (parts[0] === 127) return true;
    // 0.0.0.0/8
    if (parts[0] === 0) return true;
    // 169.254.0.0/16 (link-local)
    if (parts[0] === 169 && parts[1] === 254) return true;
    // 224.0.0.0/4 (multicast)
    if (parts[0] >= 224 && parts[0] <= 239) return true;
    // 240.0.0.0/4 (reserved)
    if (parts[0] >= 240) return true;
    // 100.64.0.0/10 (carrier-grade NAT)
    if (parts[0] === 100 && parts[1] >= 64 && parts[1] <= 127) return true;
    // 198.18.0.0/15 (benchmark testing)
    if (parts[0] === 198 && (parts[1] === 18 || parts[1] === 19)) return true;
  }

  // Check for IPv6 private/reserved ranges
  if (net.isIPv6(ip)) {
    const normalized = ip.toLowerCase();
    // Loopback ::1
    if (normalized === "::1" || normalized === "0000:0000:0000:0000:0000:0000:0000:0001") return true;
    // Unspecified ::
    if (normalized === "::" || normalized === "0000:0000:0000:0000:0000:0000:0000:0000") return true;
    // Link-local fe80::/10
    if (normalized.startsWith("fe80")) return true;
    // Unique local fc00::/7
    if (normalized.startsWith("fc") || normalized.startsWith("fd")) return true;
    // IPv4-mapped IPv6 addresses ::ffff:x.x.x.x
    if (normalized.startsWith("::ffff:")) {
      const ipv4Part = normalized.substring(7);
      if (net.isIPv4(ipv4Part)) {
        return isPrivateIP(ipv4Part);
      }
    }
  }

  return false;
}

async function validateUrl(url: string): Promise<string> {
  let parsedUrl: URL;

  try {
    parsedUrl = new URL(url);
  } catch {
    throw new Error("Invalid URL format");
  }

  // Only allow http and https protocols
  if (parsedUrl.protocol !== "http:" && parsedUrl.protocol !== "https:") {
    throw new Error("Only HTTP and HTTPS protocols are allowed");
  }

  // Block URLs with credentials
  if (parsedUrl.username || parsedUrl.password) {
    throw new Error("URLs with credentials are not allowed");
  }

  // Block non-standard ports commonly used for internal services
  const port = parsedUrl.port ? parseInt(parsedUrl.port, 10) : (parsedUrl.protocol === "https:" ? 443 : 80);
  const allowedPorts = [80, 443, 8080, 8443];
  if (!allowedPorts.includes(port)) {
    throw new Error("Port not allowed");
  }

  const hostname = parsedUrl.hostname;

  // Block IP addresses used directly in the URL
  if (net.isIPv4(hostname) || net.isIPv6(hostname)) {
    if (isPrivateIP(hostname)) {
      throw new Error("Access to private/internal IP addresses is not allowed");
    }
  }

  // Resolve DNS and check all resolved IPs
  try {
    let addresses: string[];
    try {
      addresses = await dnsResolve(hostname, "A") as string[];
    } catch {
      // Try AAAA if A record fails
      try {
        addresses = await dnsResolve(hostname, "AAAA") as string[];
      } catch {
        throw new Error("Could not resolve hostname");
      }
    }

    // Also try to get AAAA records
    try {
      const ipv6Addresses = await dnsResolve(hostname, "AAAA") as string[];
      addresses = addresses.concat(ipv6Addresses);
    } catch {
      // No AAAA records, that's fine
    }

    for (const addr of addresses) {
      if (isPrivateIP(addr)) {
        throw new Error("URL resolves to a private/internal IP address");
      }
    }
  } catch (err) {
    if (err instanceof Error && (err.message.includes("private") || err.message.includes("resolve"))) {
      throw err;
    }
    throw new Error("DNS resolution failed for the provided URL");
  }

  return parsedUrl.href;
}

function extractTitle(html: string): string {
  // Try <title> tag
  const titleMatch = html.match(/<title[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/title>/i);
  if (titleMatch && titleMatch[1]) {
    return titleMatch[1].trim();
  }

  // Try og:title
  const ogTitleMatch = html.match(/<meta[^>]*property=["']og:title["'][^>]*content=["']([^"']*)["'][^>]*\/?>/i)
    || html.match(/<meta[^>]*content=["']([^"']*)["'][^>]*property=["']og:title["'][^>]*\/?>/i);
  if (ogTitleMatch && ogTitleMatch[1]) {
    return ogTitleMatch[1].trim();
  }

  // Try twitter:title
  const twitterTitleMatch = html.match(/<meta[^>]*name=["']twitter:title["'][^>]*content=["']([^"']*)["'][^>]*\/?>/i)
    || html.match(/<meta[^>]*content=["']([^"']*)["'][^>]*name=["']twitter:title["'][^>]*\/?>/i);
  if (twitterTitleMatch && twitterTitleMatch[1]) {
    return twitterTitleMatch[1].trim();
  }

  return "";
}

function extractDescription(html: string): string {
  // Try og:description
  const ogDescMatch = html.match(/<meta[^>]*property=["']og:description["'][^>]*content=["']([^"']*)["'][^>]*\/?>/i)
    || html.match(/<meta[^>]*content=["']([^"']*)["'][^>]*property=["']og:description["'][^>]*\/?>/i);
  if (ogDescMatch && ogDescMatch[1]) {
    return ogDescMatch[1].trim();
  }

  // Try meta description
  const descMatch = html.match(/<meta[^>]*name=["']description["'][^>]*content=["']([^"']*)["'][^>]*\/?>/i)
    || html.match(/<meta[^>]*content=["']([^"']*)["'][^>]*name=["']description["'][^>]*\/?>/i);
  if (descMatch && descMatch[1]) {
    return descMatch[1].trim();
  }

  // Try twitter:description
  const twitterDescMatch = html.match(/<meta[^>]*name=["']twitter:description["'][^>]*content=["']([^"']*)["'][^>]*\/?>/i)
    || html.match(/<meta[^>]*content=["']([^"']*)["'][^>]*name=["']twitter:description["'][^>]*\/?>/i);
  if (twitterDescMatch && twitterDescMatch[1]) {
    return twitterDescMatch[1].trim();
  }

  return "";
}

app.post("/api/link-preview", async (req: Request, res: Response): Promise<void> => {
  try {
    const { url } = req.body as LinkPreviewRequest;

    if (!url || typeof url !== "string") {
      res.status(400).json({ error: "A valid URL string is required in the request body" });
      return;
    }

    // Validate URL against SSRF
    const validatedUrl: string = await validateUrl(url);

    // Fetch the URL content with safety measures
    const response = await axios.get(validatedUrl, {
      timeout: 5000,
      maxRedirects: 3,
      maxContentLength: 1024 * 1024, // 1MB max
      headers: {
        "User-Agent": "LinkPreviewBot/1.0",
        Accept: "text/html",
      },
      // Prevent axios from following redirects to internal IPs
      validateStatus: (status: number) => status >= 200 && status < 300,
      beforeRedirect: async (options: Record<string, any>) => {
        try {
          const redirectUrl = typeof options.href === "string" ? options.href : options.url;
          if (redirectUrl) {
            await validateUrl(redirectUrl);
          }
        } catch {
          throw new Error("Redirect to disallowed URL detected");
        }
      },
    });

    const contentType = response.headers["content-type"] || "";
    if (!contentType.includes("text/html") && !contentType.includes("application/xhtml")) {
      res.status(400).json({ error: "URL does not return HTML content" });
      return;
    }

    const html: string = typeof response.data === "string" ? response.data : String(response.data);

    const title = extractTitle(html);
    const description = extractDescription(html);

    const preview: LinkPreviewResponse = {
      title,
      description,
      url: validatedUrl,
    };

    res.json(preview);
  } catch (error) {
    if (error instanceof Error) {
      const isSSRFError = error.message.includes("private") ||
        error.message.includes("internal") ||
        error.message.includes("not allowed") ||
        error.message.includes("disallowed") ||
        error.message.includes("DNS resolution");

      if (isSSRFError) {
        res.status(403).json({ error: "Access to the requested URL is forbidden" });
        return;
      }

      if (error.message === "Invalid URL format") {
        res.status(400).json({ error: "Invalid URL format" });
        return;
      }
    }

    res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to fetch link preview" });
  }
});

const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;
app.listen(PORT, () => {
  console.log(`Link preview API server running on port ${PORT}`);
});

export default app;
